name: image_flux2_text_to_image
description: Flux.2 Dev text-to-image pipeline using full-precision FP8-mixed weights. Generates an image from a text prompt alone — no reference image required. Uses the Flux2Scheduler + SamplerCustomAdvanced + BasicGuider chain with guidance=4 and the Mistral 3 Small Flux.2 CLIP text encoder. Runs 20 euler steps by default; the ComfySwitchNode chain allows toggling the bundled Turbo LoRA for an 8-step fast path (edit `98:104` to `true` in the workflow JSON). Cloud-only — the FP8-mixed UNET is too heavy to run locally.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate.
